_comment: Illustrative only - requires environment-specific testing. Azure Policy that audits application registrations tagged high-privilege so a review workflow can catch over-scoped apps like the sp-infra-deploy in incident CP-INC-2001. App/service-principal permission governance largely lives in Microsoft Entra ID (app consent policies, permission classifications); this policy covers the resource-tagging side that makes those apps discoverable and reviewable.

properties.displayName: Audit resources associated with high-privilege applications
properties.description: Flags resources tagged privilegeTier=high that lack a named owner tag, so high-privilege automation identities cannot go unreviewed.
